source_constraint: All expected outputs and expectations are grounded exclusively in docs.sui.io and move-book.com.

evals.prompt: How do I write and run tests for a Sui Move module? What testing tools are available?
evals.expected_output: An explanation of the test framework, test_scenario, running tests, and coverage.
expectations: The response shows the sui move test command for running tests
The response mentions the #[test] attribute for marking test functions
The response mentions sui::test_scenario for multi-transaction, multi-sender test scenarios
The response mentions std::unit_test for assertion macros
The response mentions sui move test --coverage for tracking code coverage
The response mentions sui move coverage source --module <name> for viewing coverage results

evals.prompt: How do I install and set up Move Analyzer for VS Code?
evals.expected_output: Installation via suiup plus VS Code extension setup.
expectations: The response provides the install command: suiup install move-analyzer
The response instructs the user to install the Move Analyzer extension in VS Code
The response mentions the features: code completion, go-to-definition, diagnostics, hover documentation
The response mentions that it activates automatically for .move files
